creator: kheuer@gwdg.de
text:
The echo was just for testing and can be removed. I added -w to CFLAGS to suppress apparently harmless warnings. Sorry for PLIST_FILES, this can also be removed. I didn't take care of pkg-plist file.

I habe no www, sorry; license of the source code is a BSD kind of license. Does this help?

Sorry for my mistakes.
